mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.checkout_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, checkout_id, customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, cart_id, state_id, flow_id, subtotal, tax_amount, shipping_amount, discount_amount, total, currency, coupon_codes, item_count, payment_method, shipping_address, shipping_city, shipping_state, shipping_pincode, billing_address, order_id, created_at, last_modified_time ) SELECT ch.id, ch.tenant, NOW(), ch.id, ch.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), u.email, u.phone, ch.cart_id, ch.state_id, ch.flow_id, ch.subtotal, ch.tax_amount, ch.shipping_amount, ch.discount_amount, ch.total, ch.currency, ch.coupon_codes, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_cart.cart_item ci WHERE ci.cart_id = ch.cart_id), ch.payment_method, ch.shipping_address, ch.shipping_city, ch.shipping_state, ch.shipping_pincode, ch.billing_address, ch.order_id, ch.created_time, ch.last_modified_time FROM hm_checkout.checkout ch LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON ch.customer_id = u.id
